summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of mixologist portfolio website. All 3 pages (HomePage, CertificationsPage, ContactPage) tested successfully with no critical issues found.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and 'Crafting Liquid Art' tagline
Navigation links work correctly (Portfolio, Certifications, Contact)
Signature Creations gallery displays exactly 8 cocktail cards
Certifications page timeline shows 6 credentials with proper layout
Contact form has all required fields (Name, Email, Event Type, Message)
Event Type dropdown works with 6 options
Contact form submit button ready for mailto: functionality
Social media links (Instagram, LinkedIn) present and functional
Smooth scroll animations work - 'Explore Creations' scrolls to gallery
Professional dark theme with elegant gold accents
Contact email and location information displayed correctly
CTA button properly links to contact page
Responsive design works on desktop and mobile
